title: Anthropic Just Dropped a Masterclass on Building Agent Harnesses (for Large Codebases)
summary: Cole Medin builds a complete "AI Layer" harness for Claude Code in large codebases, implementing Anthropic's published guidance through concrete components: CLAUDE.md hierarchy, self-improving hooks, scoped skills, LSP, MCP, subagents, and a bundling plugin. The core finding is that the surrounding harness architecture matters more than the model itself.
